query: UPDATE submissions SET zipcode = LEFT(zipcode, 5) WHERE zipcode LIKE '%-%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user e1gwTrcxzNkRAvq.27ee13ac78a5 --database aXnNnkD6gAXcPtQ6Yw2PQJ --execute UPDATE submissions SET zipcode = LEFT(zipcode, 5) WHERE zipcode LIKE '%-%';
